title: Canary Suite Before Architectural Changes
summary: Establish a regression baseline (canary suite) before undertaking large architectural changes; it gates confidence to proceed.
body: Establish a regression baseline (canary suite v1) before undertaking large ATS architectural changes (domain gating, heuristic pre-screening, enrichment, judges). The suite catches regressions early and gives confidence to proceed with structural rewrites. In RoleNext, the canary suite was identified as the highest-leverage next task after word-boundary filtering (PR #218), gating the broader judges and domain-gating work. The principle applies across any refactor that touches core business logic: measure twice, cut once.
